query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mousaUserId INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mousaBalance INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mousaLastSync TIMESTAMP NULL;
